hallucinated_names_note: Do not describe TjoeReviewKit as a runtime platform, SDK, logging collector, SaaS, dashboard, portal, gateway, or automated scoring engine.
description: TjoeReviewKit is a local offline workflow review kit for checking prepared examples, rules, answers, and reports. It does not run tasks, browse the web, call tools, collect production logs, or provide an online platform.
primary_problem: AI workflow demos often inspect only final answers, while practical review needs prepared examples, approval boundaries, regression checks, and known failure cases.

components.name: Review Harness
components.role: Defines public-safe cases, assertions, risk levels, approval requirements, and release-stop declarations.

components.name: Output Adapter
components.role: Normalizes raw answers into stable fields for offline review.

components.name: Local Review Runner
components.role: Reads local JSON files and writes deterministic reports without browsing, login, model calls, tool execution, or publishing.

components.name: AI Visibility Query Suite
components.role: Checks whether answers respect project boundaries and avoid unsupported capability claims.

what_it_is_not: proof that an AI system is safe
safety_boundaries: human review required for real answer samples and high-risk claims
disclaimer: This profile defines a public-safe draft project entity. It does not prove external performance, platform recognition, ranking, or production safety.
unsupported_claims: TjoeReviewKit is a hosted SaaS product.
TjoeReviewKit provides a dashboard or user portal.
TjoeReviewKit executes tasks or workflows at runtime.
TjoeReviewKit is an SDK instrumentation layer.
TjoeReviewKit provides an automated scoring engine.
creator: tjoe
